details: Package name 'enquriers' closely resembles the popular npm package 'enquirer' (a single-character transposition plus trailing 's'). No malicious behavior — no install-time exfiltration, no remote code fetch, no credential access, no silent-relay — was identified in this version. Name-similarity alone without a payload is a subjective signal and warrants human review to confirm intent rather than auto-blocking.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
